reason: A dedicated MCP server exists for iPayX called "iPayX FX Audit MCP server". It is a forensic tool for auditing foreign exchange transactions with the endpoint URL https://mcp.ipayx.ai/mcp. The server provides tools like audit_fx_transaction and check_fx_mid_market_rate, and is available as a distinct MCP package on GitHub at iPAYX-Technologies/mcp-fx-audit.
